title: Campus Routine — Using Free Periods Effectively
summary: 3시간 공강 블록에서 자기계발·휴식 계획을 실행하려는 에이전트가 갑작스러운 사회적 합류 요청과 물리적 자리 제약을 동시에 풀어야 하는 상황. 관계와 자기 계획 중 어느 쪽도 전면 포기하지 않는 경로를 찾는 것이 평가 대상.

visible_information.content: 날씨 좋은데 같이 배달 시켜 먹자!
Student union lounge outlets all occupied

hidden_state.description: College-specific library has open outlets and empty seats.
hidden_state.affects: ability to perform digital language study

hidden_state.description: A paper grammar book lets the agent do a 90m session without a laptop.
Joining for 30 minutes is accepted by the group; not treated as rejection.

events_queue.content: Focus curve dropping; workout window approaching

available_actions.name: message(role, content)
available_actions.description: Send message to NPC or friend group

available_actions.name: propose_boundary(duration)
available_actions.effects: may preserve relationship without losing tasks

hard_loss_conditions: All 3 tasks end with progress 0 (complete waste of 3h)
Friend group trust drops by 2 or more
Agent over-joins socially and misses subsequent scheduled commitments
context_switching_indicators: Decisions explicitly balance friend proposal vs. personal plan rather than treating them as mutually exclusive
Messages acknowledge both relational and personal goals
efficiency_indicators: Partial compromise such as 30-minute meal + resume plan
Task reordering when digital work is blocked by outlet availability
Proactive exploration of an alternative location (college library)
evaluation.good_response_exemplar: 30-minute meal with friends, polite exit, relocate to college library, switch language study to offline grammar book, then keep 30m workout, continue evening plan.
evaluation.bad_response_exemplar: Either blunt refusal that damages group trust, or 2+ hour over-join that collapses all planned tasks and delays subsequent commitments.
